title: Support for /*verilator public*/ on SV structs too?

features.name: verilator_public_on_struct_typedef
features.description: Code should include a struct typedef with the /*verilator public*/ attribute applied to the typedef itself
features.snippet: typedef struct packed { logic [7:0] field; } my_struct /*verilator public*/;

features.name: packed_struct_with_enum_members
features.description: Code should include a packed struct whose fields are enum types, where both the struct and enum typedefs have /*verilator public*/
features.snippet:
typedef enum logic {n,N} T_Flg_N /*verilator public*/;
typedef struct packed { T_Flg_N N; } T_PS_Reg /*verilator public*/;

features.name: public_struct_in_package
features.description: Code should include a struct typedef with /*verilator public*/ defined inside a package declaration
